query.sql: SELECT department as name, COUNT(*) as value FROM hrm_employees WHERE status = 'Active' GROUP BY department ORDER BY value DESC

option.raw: const data = (() => { const raw = ctx.data; if (Array.isArray(raw)) return raw; if (raw && Array.isArray(raw.objects)) return raw.objects; if (raw && Array.isArray(raw.data)) return raw.data; return []; })(); if (data.length === 0) { return { title: { text: 'No Data', left: 'center', top: 'center', textStyle: { color: '#999', fontSize: 14 } } }; } const names = data.map(d => d.name || ''); const values = data.map(d => parseInt(d.value) || 0); return { title: { text: 'Employees per Department', left: 'center', textStyle: { fontSize: 14 } }, tooltip: { trigger: 'axis' }, grid: { top: 50, bottom: 30, left: 80, right: 30 }, xAxis: { type: 'value' }, yAxis: { type: 'category', data: names.reverse() }, series: [{ type: 'bar', data: values.reverse(), itemStyle: { color: '#3b82f6', borderRadius: [0, 4, 4, 0] }, label: { show: true, position: 'right' } }] };
